refnamediv.refpurpose: Apply normalized box filtering to a 3-D volume.

listitem.para: Three positive window dimensions [rows columns slices]. Default is [3 3 3].

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Uses a native 3-D integral volume to replace each voxel with the mean of its bounded neighborhood. Border neighborhoods are normalized by their actual voxel count.

refsection.title: Examples
